title: Stainless Steel Serrated Steak Knife Set, 4 Durable Multipurpose Kitchen Knives with Comfort Grip, Ergonomic - Non-Slip, Rust Resistant, Sharp Dinner Table Knife Set Can Opener
features: STEAK KNIVES: A set of four high grade traditional style Steak Knives that will easily slice through steak. Perfect for use with tenderloins, Ribeye and Sirloins
STAINLESS STEEL: Made using Stainless steel which will not rust. These durable knives will stay sharp for an effortless cut time and time again
TRADITIONAL DESIGN Designed ergonomically for comfortable use with the blade specifically shaped for cutting steaks.
MULTIUSE: This serrated blade is also perfect for effortlessly slicing through soft fruits and vegetables such as tomatoes, bread or other Meat and Poultry.
ESSENTIAL- The Chef Aid Stainless Steel Can Opener is a versatile and essential tool for any home cook who wants to quickly and easily open cans of all sizes
HIGH GRADE - Made from High Grade stainless steel, this can opener is durable and resistant to rust, ensuring that it will last for years to come
ERGONOMIC - The comfortable grip handle provides a secure and comfortable grip, allowing you to easily open cans with minimal effort and without causing strain on your hands
EFFORTLESS - The sharp cutting wheel effortlessly slices through the can lid, leaving a smooth and safe edge that won't cause any sharp or jagged edges
description: From the brand Previous page Chef Aid is the most affordable brand and offers an extensive range of products for the kitchen and home. Chef Aid is based on saving you money without compromising on quality. A complete range of solutions for the home.
